response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine high-throughput systems experience (microservices handling millions of requests per second at Sociomantic), current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, and strong TypeScript — a solid match for the AI-native mindset the role treats as baseline. However, the must-have 'strong Python' is absent from his skills and history (his systems depth is in DLang and Node.js), and his track record is mostly senior full-stack IC work with limited evidence of Staff-level technical strategy, cross-functional stakeholder leadership, or formal operational/on-call ownership at scale.
strengths: Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP/agentic-workflow experience matches the AI-native environment
Real high-throughput, low-latency systems work (millions of HTTP requests/sec at dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong TypeScript/Node.js across multiple product companies, plus deep testing and craftsmanship culture
concerns: No Python listed anywhere — a stated must-have; his systems expertise is in DLang, a niche language
Little demonstrated Staff-scope technical strategy or cross-functional stakeholder coordination
No explicit evidence of operational ownership, incident response, or on-call experience
